sme_leads.notes: Family-run kebab & pizza spot at 27-29 Queensway with 5-star food hygiene and strong footfall but no independent website — only a Facebook page, leaving them invisible on Google Search.
Established nail bar on Shirley High Street with an active Facebook following but no owned domain, so they can't capture organic search traffic or take online bookings independently.
Busy nail spa on Bitterne Road operating solely through Facebook and Instagram with no website, meaning they rely entirely on social algorithms for discovery and have no SEO presence.
Independent barbershop on Millbrook Road West with strong Booksy reviews but no owned website — a professional site with online booking would significantly lift their Google Maps ranking.
Well-reviewed traditional barbershop on Peartree Avenue using only Setmore and Nearcut for bookings with no branded website, making them difficult for new customers to find and trust online.

dts.title: DVSA wait times are insane right now — here's the legal hack
dts.hook: Open with a screenshot of a 26-week wait, then cut to a swap completing in 48 hours via drivingtestswap.uk
dts.cta: Link in bio — get your test 10+ weeks sooner

dts.title: Cancelling vs swapping your driving test — the cost nobody talks about
dts.hook: Break down the financial and time cost of cancelling (lost fee, re-book queue) versus swapping (no re-queue, keep your prep momentum), positioning DTS as the smart move

athletics.title: 30-day calisthenics progression — week 1 to week 4 side-by-side
athletics.hook: Film each week at the gym: L-sit hold → tuck planche attempt → muscle-up progress; compress into a 60-second split-screen clip

athletics.title: My track sprint warm-up routine in under 90 seconds
athletics.hook: Film at the track: dynamic drills, A-skips, acceleration ramp-up, then the first flying 30m — raw and uncut
athletics.cta: Drop your PB in the comments

aimybiz.title: We ran a 3-week CloseCoach pilot with a 5-person estate agency sales team. Here's what changed.
aimybiz.hook: Open with a before/after metric (e.g. cold-call conversion rate), then walk through 3 specific objection scenarios the AI coached them on — ends with a CTA to book a free team demo
aimybiz.cta: Comment 'DEMO' and I'll send you the link

aimybiz.title: What does AI sales coaching actually look like? [CloseCoach 2-min demo]
aimybiz.hook: Screen-record a live roleplay session: rep gets an objection, AI gives instant feedback on tone, pacing and reframe — targeted at sales managers tired of inconsistent 1-to-1 coaching
aimybiz.cta: Try it free with your team at closecoach.io
